uplink.description: heartbeat, no leak on any channel, battery ok
uplink._note: Input is the upstream TTN heartbeat example (bytes[12]=0xF0 = all channel status bits set = active-LOW so no alarm). expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary and produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js's field extraction; leak=false because no channel alarms.

uplink.description: leak alarm on channels 1 and 3, low battery, temp 18C
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. bytes[12]=0xAF: channel-1 (0x10) and channel-3 (0x40) status bits clear = active-LOW alarm = leak; low nibble 0xF = low-battery flag. bytes[13..14]=1,44 -> frameCounter 300. expected.data cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js field extraction and normalized to the vocabulary.

uplink.description: parameter report frame carries no measurement

errors: parameter report frame carries no normalized measurement

uplink._note: Input is the upstream TTN parameter-packet example (bytes[3]==0x03). Upstream decodes it to device settings (firmware/uploadInterval/batteryThreshold/monitorStatus); these are not normalized measurements, so our codec reports an error.
